app.name: ElinaCura
app.description: Personalized wellness safety for people with chronic conditions

hero.allDone: You're all caught up for today
hero.allDoneSub: Nice work — keep the momentum with hydration and an easy wind-down tonight.

weather.errorBody: We couldn't fetch current conditions for your location. Check your connection or location permission and try again.

footer.hint: Care AI can help adjust the rest of your day.

error.title: We couldn't load your health overview
error.body: Something went wrong while fetching your data. Your dashboard is still here — try again.

meds.caption: 92% adherence over the last 7 days. Evening doses are the most missed.

rhythm.title: 7-day health rhythm
rhythm.sub: Composite of sleep, activity and adherence
rhythm.caption: Your rhythm dipped Wednesday and Friday, driven by missed evening meds and shorter sleep. Weekends were your strongest days.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.allClear: Nothing needs your attention right now.

careAI.insight: Your HRV dropped 10% overnight while your resting heart rate elevated slightly. I recommend a 15-minute active recovery walk today instead of high-intensity training.
careAI.followUp: Let's adjust today's plan. I've rescheduled your HIIT workout to tomorrow.

trends.title: This week
trends.sub: How your key metrics are moving

onboarding.title: Let's set up your health profile
onboarding.lead: You don't have a profile yet. Create one to unlock a dashboard tailored to your conditions, medications, and goals.
onboarding.step1Body: Share your goals, conditions, and medications so guidance fits you.
onboarding.step2Body: Meal, grocery, and safety suggestions adapt to your health context.
onboarding.step3Body: Interaction checks and an emergency medical ID, ready when you need them.

welcome.lead: Here's your profile at a glance. Connect a device or log your day to start seeing trends and a daily plan.
welcome.analyticsBody: Connect a device or log medications, meals, and vitals to see readiness, adherence, and trends here.

snapshot.title: Health snapshot
snapshot.sub: A quick read on where things stand today

desc.overview: Your daily health command center — vitals, meds, and what's next.

keyVitals.title: Key vitals
keyVitals.sub: Tap a vital to open its detail

metrics.description: Track vitals over time and log new readings.

conditions.description: Conditions you're managing and how they're trending.

recs.description: Meals, movement, and recovery tailored to your profile.

logs.historySub: Track sleep, vitals, and mood in one place
logs.emptyBody: Tap a quick-log card to record your first entry.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Your health identity, goals, and the preferences that shape your guidance

completeness.label: Profile completeness

items.blood: Set blood type on Medical ID

preferences.title: Preferences & lifestyle

tuning.sub: Shapes how guidance and alerts behave

privacy.title: Privacy & trust
privacy.body: Your conditions, goals and preferences are used only to personalize recommendations and reminders. They're never shown to other members of your circle without your consent.

footer.title: Profile powers your care plan
footer.sub: Goals and preferences flow into meals, activity, and AI guidance.

notes.morning: Take with breakfast for steady absorption.

swap.altWhy: Alternative pick aligned with your dietary goals.

privacy.title: Privacy & account
privacy.body: Your data is used only to personalize your care. You can export or manage it anytime.

actionsDesc.local: Preferences sync locally until you connect a cloud account.
actionsDesc.export: Download a copy of your profile and preferences.
actionsDesc.delete: Permanently remove your data from ElinaCura.

sidebar.title: Quick links
sidebar.tipBody: Theme, language, and notification choices are saved on this device.

footer.title: Export your settings
footer.sub: Copy a summary of your preferences for backup or caregiver handoff.
footer.readySub: Your profile looks well configured — share a summary with your care circle if helpful.

chatPage.title: Care AI
chatPage.subtitle: Personal guidance grounded in your health profile, medications, and daily plan.
chatPage.greeting: Hi {name}! I'm your Care AI. Ask about sleep, medications, meals, activity, or when to reach out for help.
chatPage.placeholder: Ask about your health, medications, or plan…
chatPage.welcomeSub: Tap a prompt or type your own below
chatPage.disclaimer: Care AI offers general guidance and isn't a substitute for professional medical advice.

suggestions.sleepTonight: How can I sleep better tonight?
suggestions.missedMeds: Did I miss any medications this week?
suggestions.sideEffects: What should I watch for with my meds?
suggestions.sodiumCheck: Am I on track with sodium today?
suggestions.readiness: Why is my readiness score lower?
suggestions.hydration: How much water should I drink?
suggestions.symptoms: When should I worry about symptoms?
suggestions.whenToCall: When should I call my doctor?

replies.sleep: Your readiness is {score}% today. {insight} A good start: {tip}. Keep screens off 30 minutes before bed and aim for your 7.5h sleep goal.
replies.meds: You have {count} active medications ({meds}). Over the last 7 days I see {missed} missed dose(s). Keep evening meds consistent — that's where slips tend to happen.
replies.nutrition: {insight} Watch out for: {avoid}. Your meal plan favors leafy greens, lean protein, and whole grains — want a dinner suggestion from today's plan?
replies.activity: Readiness is {score}% — {insight} I'd suggest: {tip}. Add an extra glass of water if you're heading out.
replies.safety: If you have chest pain, trouble breathing, sudden weakness, or symptoms that feel urgent, call emergency services. For non-urgent concerns, note your symptoms and reach your care team through Telehealth.
replies.default: Thanks, {name}. I'm looking at your profile focused on {intent}. Ask me about sleep, meds, meals, activity, or safety and I'll tailor guidance to your data.

sidebar.tipBody: Care AI is for day-to-day guidance. Book telehealth or call your provider for clinical decisions.

footer.title: Questions for your clinician?
footer.sub: Save chat takeaways and follow up in a telehealth visit.

chatPage.noResponse: I couldn't generate a response. Please try again.
chatPage.blocked: I can't help with that message. Please rephrase and try again.
chatPage.needsReview: This message needs review before I can respond. Please rephrase.
chatPage.errorReply: Something went wrong reaching Care AI. Please try again in a moment.
chatPage.noProfileTitle: Create a profile to start chatting
chatPage.noProfileBody: Care AI tailors its guidance to your conditions, medications, and goals. Set up your profile first.

travelModePage.title: Travel mode
travelModePage.subtitle: Prepare your medications and routine for the trip
travelModePage.allReadySub: Supply, packing, and dose timing are covered. Safe travels — your care plan travels with you.
travelModePage.insightReady: Everything is packed and your supply covers the trip.
travelModePage.insightSupply: Medication supply is short for this trip — request refills before you leave.
travelModePage.insightChecklist: {remaining, plural, one {# packing item left} other {# packing items left}} before you're travel-ready.
travelModePage.insightDefault: Review supply, pack essentials, and preview dose times in the destination time zone.

supply.title: Medication supply
supply.refillSub: {names} may run low — request refills early.

schedule.title: Dose timing
schedule.sub: Preview home vs destination dose times

strategyDesc.keep: Take doses at the same absolute time — shown on the destination clock.
strategyDesc.shift: Shift toward your home schedule by up to 2 hours per day after arrival.

schedule.empty: Add medication reminders to preview a travel dose plan.
schedule.advisory: Advisory only — confirm timing changes with your care team before you travel.

share.title: Travel prep checklist
share.supplyOk: Supply: {supply} days for a {trip}-day trip ({spare} spare)
share.supplyShort: Supply: {supply} days for a {trip}-day trip — need {gap} more days
share.footer: Generated from your ElinaCura travel plan.

footer.title: Finish your travel prep
footer.sub: Share your plan with a caregiver or double-check refills and reminders.
footer.readySub: You're packed and covered — enjoy the trip with confidence.

travelModePage.footnote: Travel mode is advisory. Confirm medication timing and travel documentation with your clinician.

familyCirclePage.title: Family circle
familyCirclePage.subtitle: The people who help with your care
familyCirclePage.heroDescription: {name}'s circle has {count} members helping with daily care, safety, and wellness.

rolesSection.sub: Choose the right access level for each person

privacy.title: Privacy & trust
privacy.sub: You're always in control of what's shared
privacy.body: Your health data is shared only with people you invite. Each role has clear boundaries — and you can change or revoke access anytime.

consent.title: Consent first
consent.body: Nothing is shared until you explicitly invite someone.

control.title: Role-based access
control.body: Caregivers see more than viewers — you pick the level.

audit.title: Revoke anytime
audit.body: Remove a member or downgrade their role in one tap.

footer.title: Strengthen your care circle
footer.sub: Invite a caregiver or care-team viewer to improve coverage when you need help.
footer.readySub: Caregivers, family, and your care team are connected. Keep sharing moments and updates.

access.owner: Full control of the care plan and circle
access.caregiver: Views health data and manages reminders

connectionsPage.title: Connections
connectionsPage.subtitle: Devices, pharmacies and providers linked to ElinaCura
connectionsPage.heroDescription: {connected} of {total} sources are linked and syncing with your care plan.

empty.title: No matches
empty.sub: Try a different search or filter to find a linked source.

sidebar.tipBody: Linked devices and providers give ElinaCura richer vitals, refill timing, and visit context for safer guidance.

share.title: ElinaCura connections
share.footer: Generated from your ElinaCura linked sources.

footer.title: Link the rest of your care stack

footer.readySub: Devices, pharmacy, and clinic are linked. ElinaCura has the context it needs.

momentsPage.title: Moments
momentsPage.subtitle: Wellness moments and milestones from your circle
momentsPage.heroDescription: Share milestones, photos, and notes with the people who support your care journey.
momentsPage.ephemeralHint: Moments are visible to your circle for 24 hours, then fade away.
momentsPage.sharePrompt: Share a moment with your circle
momentsPage.emptySub: Be the first to share a win, a walk, or a family meal with your circle.
momentsPage.composerSub: Celebrate a win or check in with your circle
momentsPage.livePhotoHint: Live sharing requires a photo — use your device camera when connected.

placeholders.milestone: Share a milestone — e.g. a streak, appointment, or goal reached…
placeholders.note: Write a quick check-in your circle will appreciate…

momentsPage.circleDescription: {count} people can view and react to shared moments.

tips.tip1: Lead with the win — adherence streaks and small victories matter most.
tips.tip2: Keep captions short so caregivers scanning the feed catch the highlight fast.
tips.tip3: Photos of meals or walks help your circle stay connected between visits.

footer.title: Small updates build big trust
footer.sub: Regular moments help caregivers spot patterns early and celebrate progress with you.

digestPage.title: Weekly digest
digestPage.subtitle: Your week in review · {period}
digestPage.heroDescription: A calm summary of what moved, what slipped, and what to focus on next.
digestPage.rhythmTapHint: Tap a day on the chart or pills below
digestPage.scoreNarrative: Strongest on {{best}}; watch {{lowest}} for recovery dips.
digestPage.pastWeekHint: Historical digest — switch back to the current week for highlights and focus items.

day.title: {{day}} breakdown
day.flagHint: Sleep or meds dipped — a lighter day may help recovery.

footer.title: Carry the week into action
footer.sub: Turn insights into a provider report or keep tracking day to day.
footer.readySub: Create a care-team report or share your weekly summary.
footer.reportDesc: Build a PDF for your provider

empty.title: No weekly digest yet
empty.body: Your weekly summary builds from logged medications, meals, and activity. Once you start tracking your week, your digest will appear here.

scannerPage.title: Scanner
scannerPage.subtitle: Scan a medication or product for safety flags
scannerPage.heroDescription: Scan barcodes in the store or at home to surface medication interactions, sodium limits, and allergen flags before you buy.
scannerPage.noProfileHint: Scanning works in demo mode. Connect a care profile for personalized safety analysis.
scannerPage.viewportSub: Point your camera at a barcode
scannerPage.viewportHint: Center the barcode within the frame
scannerPage.cameraIdle: Open the camera to scan a barcode in real time
scannerPage.enableCamera: To enable: tap the camera icon in your browser address bar, then allow access.
scannerPage.manualFallback: You can still type the barcode below.
scannerPage.manualHint: Try grapefruit juice, ibuprofen, or atorvastatin for demo results.
scannerPage.recentSub: Tap a scan to review it again
scannerPage.emptyHistorySub: Your checked products will appear here.

tips.tip1: Hold the barcode 6–8 inches away and keep the label flat.
tips.tip2: In bright stores, tilt the package to reduce glare on the code.
tips.tip3: For medication bottles, use Capture label when the barcode is worn.

footer.title: Turn scans into safer choices
footer.sub: Pair the scanner with your grocery list and meal plan so every trip stays aligned with your care goals.

demo.grapefruitNote: Interacts with atorvastatin — avoid while on your evening statin.
demo.ibuprofenNote: May affect blood pressure — monitor if you take Lisinopril.
demo.atorvastatinNote: Matches your current statin with no new interaction flags.
demo.brothNote: Sodium level fits your low-sodium grocery plan.
demo.soupNote: Higher sodium than your daily target — consider a lower-salt option.

scannerPage.notFoundNote: We couldn't find this barcode in the product database. Try scanning again or enter it manually.
scannerPage.lookupUnavailableNote: We couldn't reach the product database. Check your connection and try again.
scannerPage.needBarcode: Enter a numeric barcode (the digits beneath the bars) to look up a product.
scannerPage.noProfileSafety: Select a profile to get personalized safety checks for your medications and conditions.

ocrCapturePage.title: Scan Med Label
ocrCapturePage.subtitle: Capture a medication's label, bottle, pill, or barcode — we extract the details and nothing is saved until you confirm.
ocrCapturePage.savedSub: The label details are on file. Review your med list or scan another bottle.
ocrCapturePage.reviewImageHint: We read the details from this photo. Edit anything that looks off.
ocrCapturePage.barcodeFound: Found from barcode ({code}). Review and save.
ocrCapturePage.drugBarcodeFound: Identified from barcode: {name}. Review and save.

chooser.title: Multiple matches found
chooser.sub: This barcode matched more than one product
chooser.hint: {count} medications share this code. Select the one that matches your package.

camera.hint: Point at the label, bottle, pill, or barcode

moderation.title: Some text was hidden
moderation.body: We hid content that looked unsafe in: {fields}. Check those fields before saving.

nafdac.title: NAFDAC registration (Nigeria)
nafdac.sub: Check this medication against NAFDAC's Green Book of registered products.
nafdac.notFound: No NAFDAC match for this name. Check the spelling or enter details manually.
nafdac.unavailable: NAFDAC lookup is unavailable right now. Try again later.

ocrCapturePage.captureHint: Point at the label, bottle, pill, or barcode, then capture or upload a photo
ocrCapturePage.fileTypes: JPEG, PNG, HEIC, or WebP · up to 10 MB
ocrCapturePage.fileReady: Ready to read — tap capture to scan
ocrCapturePage.scanningHint: This usually takes a few seconds.
ocrCapturePage.reviewSub: Edit anything that looks off before saving
ocrCapturePage.reviewFlags: {count, plural, one {# field needs a look} other {# fields need a look}}
ocrCapturePage.manualSub: Skip the camera and type what you see

tips.title: Better reads
tips.light: Use bright, even light — avoid glare on glossy labels
tips.focus: Hold steady until the label text is sharp
tips.flat: Lay the bottle flat so the full label fits the frame

sidebar.tipBody: After saving, use the barcode scanner to verify food and supplement interactions.

footer.title: Keep your med list current
footer.sub: Scan new prescriptions as they arrive so doses stay accurate.

errors.noProfile: Set up a profile first — that's where saved medications are stored.
errors.noName: Add a medication name before saving.
errors.cameraBlocked: Camera access is blocked. Allow camera access in your browser, or upload a photo instead.
errors.cameraUnsupported: This browser can't open the camera here. Upload a photo instead.
errors.cameraUnavailable: We couldn't start the camera. Upload a photo instead.
errors.barcodeNotFound: We couldn't match that barcode. Enter the medication details manually.
errors.lookupUnavailable: The barcode lookup is unavailable right now. Try again or enter the details manually.
errors.unavailable: The label reader is unavailable right now. You can enter the details manually below.
errors.tooLarge: That image is over 10 MB. Try a smaller photo.
errors.unsupported: That file type isn't supported. Use a JPEG, PNG, HEIC, or WebP image.
errors.emptyImage: That file looked empty. Capture or upload the label again.
errors.rateLimited: You've scanned a lot of labels recently. Wait a little while and try again.
errors.auth: Your session expired. Sign in again to scan labels.
errors.accountRequired: Scanning saves to your medication list, so it needs a full account. Sign in or create one (guest sessions can't scan).
errors.invalid: We couldn't process that image. Try another photo or enter the details manually.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save that medication. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong reading the label. Try again or enter the details manually.

reportPage.title: Health report
reportPage.subtitle: Assemble a shareable report for your provider
reportPage.heroDescription: Choose a date range and sections, preview the document, then generate a PDF or share directly with your provider.
reportPage.printToast: Opening print dialog — save as PDF from your browser.

templates.title: Quick templates
templates.sub: Start from a common visit type

pcp.desc: Standard follow-up with vitals, meds, and adherence

cardiology.desc: 90-day view with conditions and care notes

visit.title: Pre-visit
visit.desc: Light recap before an upcoming appointment

recipient.label: Prepared for
recipient.hint: Name shown on the report cover — your provider or care team
recipient.placeholder: Dr. Smith or care team name

coverNote.label: Note to provider
coverNote.hint: Optional message included on the cover page
coverNote.placeholder: e.g. Focusing on blood pressure trends since our last visit…

reportPage.expandHint: Tap a section to expand full details

footer.title: Need more context?
footer.sub: Finish configuring your report, or pull extra insights before you share.
footer.readySub: Print, share, or copy the summary — then explore related health views below.
footer.digestDesc: Review wins, flags, and rhythm trends

highlights.secure: Your data stays on your device until you share
highlights.provider: Formatted for clinicians and care teams

rangeHints.7d: Best for a quick visit recap — covers the last {{days}} days.
rangeHints.30d: Standard follow-up window — covers the last {{days}} days.
rangeHints.90d: Longitudinal view for specialists — covers the last {{days}} days.

reportPage.emptyState: Toggle at least one section to preview your report.

tips.title: Before you share
tips.tip1: Include vitals and adherence for most follow-up visits.
tips.tip2: Use 30 days unless your provider asked for a longer window.
tips.tip3: Review the preview — you can adjust sections anytime.

voicePage.title: Voice
voicePage.subtitle: Speak naturally to log meds, check your plan, or ask Care AI — hands-free.
voicePage.processingSub: Understanding your request and checking your care profile.
voicePage.tip: Tap the orb to simulate listening, or choose a command below.
voicePage.emptySub: Tap a suggested command or use the mic orb to start your first hands-free request.
voicePage.commandsSub: Tap to simulate a voice command
voicePage.disclaimer: Voice guidance is informational and not a substitute for professional medical advice.

commands.missedDose: Did I miss any doses this week?
commands.whenToCall: When should I call my doctor?

replies.logTaken: Logged {med} as taken. I'll reflect that in your adherence log.
replies.nextMeds: Your next dose is {med} at {time}. I'll keep nudging you at the usual reminder time.
replies.missedDose: You had two missed evening doses this week — mostly Atorvastatin. Want me to tighten those reminders?
replies.logBp: Blood pressure logging by voice is coming soon. For now, open Health to record today's reading.
replies.readiness: Your readiness is {score}% today. Sleep was a little inconsistent — keep intensity moderate.
replies.activity: With today's readiness, a 30–40 minute easy walk would fit well. Hydrate a little extra afterward.
replies.lowConfidence: I didn't catch that clearly enough to act. Try again a little slower, or tap a suggested command.
replies.unknown: I didn't understand that. Try a medication or wellness command from the list below.
replies.default: Got it — I'm looking at your care profile now.

capabilities.title: What voice can do
capabilities.logMedsDesc: Say you took a dose and we'll update adherence.
capabilities.checkPlanDesc: Ask about sleep, activity, meals, and readiness.
capabilities.safetyDesc: Get general guidance on when to escalate to a clinician.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Raw audio is never stored. Only text transcripts are saved — and only if you opt in below.
privacy.consentSub: Stored under your account with the same retention as chat history.

share.title: Voice transcript
share.empty: No voice turns to share yet.
share.footer: Generated from your ElinaCura voice session.

footer.title: Switch to Care AI chat

voicePage.ack: Got it — I'm on it. (Live voice arrives in a later update.)

medicationProof.settingsDescription: When on, recording a dose as taken requires a photo of the medication in your hand and a short video of you swallowing it, verified before the dose counts.
medicationProof.lockedExplanation: A caregiver turned this on for accountability, so it can't be turned off from your account. Ask your caregiver to turn it off.
medicationProof.accountRequired: Sign in with an account to manage Medication Proof.
medicationProof.noProfile: Select a profile to manage Medication Proof.
medicationProof.loadError: Couldn't load the Medication Proof setting.
medicationProof.captureIntro: Take a photo of the medication in your hand and record a short video of you taking it.
medicationProof.rejectedHelp: Please try again with a clearer photo and video.
medicationProof.verifierUnavailable: Verification is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
medicationProof.invalidMedia: That photo or video couldn't be used. Please capture them again.
medicationProof.submitError: Couldn't submit your proof. Please try again.
medicationProof.noCameraBody: We couldn't access a camera, so proof can't be captured. The dose was not recorded as taken.
medicationProof.permissionDeniedBody: Camera access was denied, so proof can't be captured. The dose was not recorded as taken.
medicationProof.missingMedia: Add both a photo and a video before submitting.

dashboard.noSignalsYet: Add conditions, allergies, and medications to map your care.

dashboard.heroEmptyBody: Personalized safety coverage, meal plans, and daily wellness — built around your conditions, not around averages.

notifications.categoriesDescription: Choose which kinds of push notifications you want to receive.

categoryDescriptions.safety: Critical safety notifications such as drug interactions and allergen warnings.
categoryDescriptions.meal-reminder: Scheduled reminders for meals and hydration.
categoryDescriptions.caregiver: Activity from people you have invited as caregivers.
categoryDescriptions.app-updates: Product changes, new features, and maintenance notices.

prompt.title: Stay on top of your safety
prompt.body: Turn on push notifications to receive timely safety alerts, medication reminders, and caregiver updates — even when ElinaCura is closed.
prompt.frequency: We only send what matters. Expect a few notifications per week, never more than a couple per day.

principles.p1: Nourish gently. Every small choice compounds into lasting wellness.
principles.p2: Independence isn't luck — it's a thousand quiet, intentional choices.
principles.p3: She never had an app. She had consistency, awareness, and care.
principles.p4: Living well isn't a destination. It's a practice.
principles.p5: The body remembers what the mind forgets. Feed it well.
principles.p6: Small intentions, sustained daily, become long lives.

a11y.sessionExpiringSoon: Your session is expiring soon. Extend it to keep working without losing your progress.

ios.title: Add to Home Screen

ios.announcement: Add to Home Screen instructions shown.

settings.title: Character settings
settings.description: Pick how the on-screen character behaves on each route.
settings.static_character_description: Render the character without animation. Saves battery on older devices.
settings.captions_always_on_description: Display captions even when audio is enabled.
settings.clear_cache_description: Remove cached character bundles. They will be re-downloaded on next use.
settings.reset_confirmation: Reset all character settings to their defaults?

nurse.name: Elina
nurse.alt: Elina the nurse character — warm and caring wellness guide
nurse.greeting_morning: Good morning! Ready to start your day strong?
nurse.greeting_afternoon: Good afternoon! How are you feeling today?
nurse.greeting_evening: Good evening! Time to wind down and reflect.
nurse.tip_safety: I'm checking your safety profile now. Stay informed.
nurse.tip_reminders: Your medication reminders are set. I'll keep you on track.
nurse.tip_default: Here to keep you safe and well. Ask me anything.

doctor.name: Dr. Marcus
doctor.alt: Dr. Marcus the doctor character — authoritative and calm health guide
doctor.greeting_morning: Let's review your health status for today.
doctor.greeting_afternoon: Your health data looks good. Anything to discuss?
doctor.greeting_evening: A good day for reflecting on your health choices.
doctor.tip_report: Your health report is ready to review.
doctor.tip_chat: Ask me about your medications, symptoms, or test results.
doctor.tip_telehealth: Ready to connect with your care team?
doctor.tip_default: Your health is my priority. What would you like to know?

dietician.name: Maya
dietician.alt: Maya the dietician character — energetic and bright nutrition guide
dietician.greeting_morning: Let's fuel your day with the right foods!
dietician.greeting_afternoon: Halfway through the day — how's your nutrition?
dietician.greeting_evening: Great time to plan tomorrow's meals.
dietician.tip_grocery: Your grocery list is optimized for your health profile.
dietician.tip_meals: I've planned meals that work perfectly with your conditions.
dietician.tip_default: Good nutrition is powerful medicine. Let's eat well together.

pharmacist.name: Sam
pharmacist.alt: Sam the pharmacist character — precise and trustworthy medication guide
pharmacist.greeting_afternoon: All clear on interactions for your afternoon meds.
pharmacist.tip_scanner: Scan any product to check it against your profile.
pharmacist.tip_default: I keep your medications safe and your interactions in check.

pediatrician.name: Dr. Lily
pediatrician.alt: Dr. Lily the pediatrician character — playful and cheerful child health guide
pediatrician.greeting_morning: Good morning, family! How is everyone feeling?
pediatrician.greeting_afternoon: How is the little one doing today?
pediatrician.tip_profile: Keep the family profile updated for the best care.
pediatrician.tip_default: Every child deserves the best care. I'm here to help.

coach.name: Coach Alex
coach.alt: Coach Alex the coach character — motivating and upbeat wellness guide
coach.greeting_morning: Rise and shine! Your wellness goals await!
coach.greeting_afternoon: Keep that momentum going — you're doing great!
coach.greeting_evening: Reflect on your wins today. Every step counts!
coach.tip_dashboard: Your wellness score is looking great. Let's keep it up!
coach.tip_voice: Ready to talk through your goals? I'm listening.
coach.tip_digest: Your weekly digest is ready — let's review your progress!
coach.tip_default: You've got this! Consistency is the key to lasting wellness.

emergency_responder.name: Jordan
emergency_responder.alt: Jordan the emergency responder character — confident and urgent emergency guide
emergency_responder.greeting_morning: Stay prepared. Your Medical ID is up to date.
emergency_responder.greeting_afternoon: All emergency contacts are in place.
emergency_responder.greeting_evening: Your emergency plan is ready if you ever need it.
emergency_responder.tip_emergency: Your Medical ID is ready to share with first responders.
emergency_responder.tip_telehealth: Need urgent care? I can connect you with a provider now.
emergency_responder.tip_default: I'm here when every second counts. Stay safe.

concerned.nurse: Your nurse is concerned about your health data. Please review.

ocrCapture.enterMedicationName: Enter the medication name to confirm.

authPage.storyBodyCompactPrefix: Our grandmother Elina lived over 110 years — healthy, strong, and independent until the very end. ElinaCura is built on her philosophy: the right food, the right care, personalized to
authPage.storyBodyFullPart1: Our grandmother, Elina, lived over 110 years — healthy, strong, and completely independent until the very end. No pain. No physical support. Just a life lived with intention: the right food, the right movement, consistent care.
authPage.storyBodyFullPart2Prefix: ElinaCura is built on that philosophy. What you eat, what you take, and how you live matter deeply — and should be personalized to
authPage.storyQuote: We built the app she never had, so you can live the life she naturally found.
authPage.storyVisualTimeline: Eleven decades, on her own terms.
authPage.mfaLeadTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
authPage.mfaLeadBackup: Enter one of the backup codes you saved when you enabled two-factor authentication. Each code can be used once.
authPage.mfaErrorTotpEnter: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
authPage.mfaErrorBackupEnter: Enter one of the backup codes you saved when enabling two-factor.
authPage.mfaErrorTotpMismatch: That code didn’t match. Wait for the next code your authenticator shows, or use a backup code.
authPage.mfaErrorBackupMismatch: That backup code didn’t match or has already been used. Try another.
authPage.mfaErrorGeneric: We couldn’t complete sign-in. Please try again.
authPage.mfaErrorProfileLoad: Signed in, but we couldn’t load your profile. Please refresh.
authPage.mfaAnnounceEnter: Enter your authenticator code to finish signing in.
authPage.mfaLowBackupCodes: You’re running low on backup codes. Open Settings → Two-factor authentication to generate a fresh batch.
authPage.formLeadSignin: Sign in to access your care context.
authPage.formLeadPhoneSend: We will send a one-time verification code.
authPage.formLeadPhoneVerify: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your device.
authPage.caregiverOrgLink: Are you a caregiving organization? Sign in here

authPage.chooseSub: Two ways in — one for you, one for your team.

authPage.chooseTeamDesc: Manage clients and coordinate care across your organization.
authPage.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

mfaEnrolment.announceScanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
mfaEnrolment.announceCodeAccepted: Code accepted. Save your backup codes before continuing.
mfaEnrolment.errorStartFallback: Could not start MFA enrolment. Please try again.
mfaEnrolment.errorEnterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfaEnrolment.errorVerifyFallback: That code didn't match. Try the next code your authenticator shows.
mfaEnrolment.errorEnrolExpired: Your enrolment session expired. Start again to generate a new QR code.
mfaEnrolment.toastClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard not available in this browser. Copy them manually.
mfaEnrolment.toastCopyError: Could not copy to clipboard. Copy them manually.
mfaEnrolment.title: Set up two-factor authentication
mfaEnrolment.description: Add a second factor so a stolen password alone can’t unlock your account.
mfaEnrolment.introParagraph: We’ll generate a one-time secret and show a QR code you can scan with any TOTP authenticator app (1Password, Authy, Google Authenticator, and so on).
mfaEnrolment.introStep1: Scan the QR code or paste the fallback secret into your app.
mfaEnrolment.introStep2: Enter the 6-digit code your app shows to verify.
mfaEnrolment.introStep3: Save the ten backup codes in a secure place.
mfaEnrolment.qrAriaLabel: QR code containing your TOTP secret
mfaEnrolment.fallbackHelp: Use this fallback string if your camera can’t scan the QR code. The secret expires in 10 minutes.
mfaEnrolment.codeRefreshHelp: The code refreshes every 30 seconds. If the first attempt fails, wait for the next code and try again.
mfaEnrolment.saveNowWarning: Save these now — we won’t show them again.
mfaEnrolment.saveNowBody: Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. Store them in a password manager or print them and keep them somewhere safe.
mfaEnrolment.savedAffirm: I have saved my backup codes.

settingsMfa.announceEnabled: Two-factor authentication is now enabled on your account.
settingsMfa.announceRegenerated: New backup codes generated. Save them before closing this dialog.
settingsMfa.announceDisabled: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account.
settingsMfa.title: Two-factor authentication
settingsMfa.description: Add a TOTP authenticator app as a second factor so a stolen password alone cannot unlock your account. Caregiver and family-circle guardian roles require two-factor authentication.
settingsMfa.notEnabledHelp: Enable an authenticator app to add a second factor.
settingsMfa.lowCodesBanner: Running low on backup codes. Generate a fresh batch so you don’t get locked out.
settingsMfa.roleRequiredNote: MFA is required for caregiver and guardian roles. Step down from the role before disabling.
settingsMfa.regenerateDialogDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. The previous backup codes will stop working immediately.
settingsMfa.disableDialogDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm. Your TOTP secret and remaining backup codes will be revoked.
settingsMfa.codeRefreshHelp: The code refreshes every 30 seconds. Wait for the next code if the first attempt fails.
settingsMfa.codesDialogDescription: Save these now — we won’t show them again. The previous codes are no longer valid.
settingsMfa.toastClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard not available in this browser. Copy them manually.
settingsMfa.toastCopyError: Could not copy to clipboard. Copy them manually.
settingsMfa.savedAffirm: I have saved my backup codes.
settingsMfa.errorRegenerateFallback: Could not regenerate backup codes. Please try again.
settingsMfa.errorDisableFallback: Could not disable two-factor authentication. Please try again.
settingsMfa.errorCodeMismatch: That code didn't match. Try the next code your authenticator shows.
settingsMfa.errorMfaRequired: MFA is required for caregiver and guardian roles. Step down from the role first.
settingsMfa.errorNotEnrolled: Two-factor authentication isn't enabled on this account.

interactionWarning.modalDescription: Review and acknowledge each warning before proceeding.

errorBoundary.bodyDefault: ElinaCura encountered an unexpected issue. Your data is safe.
errorBoundary.bodyChunkError: We just shipped an update. Reloading…
errorBoundary.bodyChunk: A new version is available. Reloading automatically…
errorBoundary.bodyError: We hit an unexpected error. You can try again or return to the dashboard.

riskBadge.tooltipLow: Low risk — no significant concerns flagged based on your profile.
riskBadge.tooltipModerate: Moderate risk — review the details. May warrant a swap or pharmacist input.
riskBadge.tooltipHigh: High risk — material concern detected. Consult your physician before relying on this option.
riskBadge.tooltipAvoid: Avoid — strongly inappropriate for your profile. Do not consume.
riskBadge.tooltipError: Error — the safety check could not be completed. Treat as unverified.
riskBadge.tooltipUnknown: Unknown — no safety data available for this item yet.
riskBadge.tooltipUncertain: Low confidence — this safety annotation is uncertain. Treat as preliminary.

updateAvailableToast.title: New version available
updateAvailableToast.body: Reload to apply the latest improvements. You can keep using the current version until you're ready.

offlineFallback.heading: You’re offline on {pageName}
offlineFallback.body: Some of ElinaCura works while offline. Anything that needs a fresh answer from the network will be unavailable until you reconnect.
offlineFallback.retryHelper: We’ll reload as soon as you’re back online.

familyCircle.label: Family Circle
familyCircle.keywords: family circle household members group share

hero.title: Your health, protected by
hero.subtitle: Medication-aware grocery planning, AI nutrition guidance, emergency medical ID, and caregiver sharing — built around your conditions, not around averages.
hero.imageAlt: Calm morning light in a serene wellness space
hero.bullet2: AI nutrition guidance for your conditions
hero.socialProof: Loved by people managing their wellness

features.title: Everything your wellness needs, in one place.
features.subtitle: Six integrated safety tools that work together to keep you informed, prepared, and in control.

safety.title: Safety Monitoring
safety.description: Continuous cross-checking of your medications, allergies, and conditions. Get flagged before problems happen.

scanner.title: Barcode Scanner
scanner.description: Scan any food product and instantly see if it's safe for your specific health profile.

meals.title: Smart Meal Planning
meals.description: Nutritionally balanced meal plans tailored to your conditions, allergies, and dietary preferences.

ai.title: AI Health Chat
ai.description: Context-aware health assistant that knows your profile. Ask anything about nutrition, medications, or wellness.

emergency.title: Emergency Medical ID
emergency.description: Critical health information accessible to first responders — even offline. Always ready when seconds count.

caregiver.title: Caregiver Sharing
caregiver.description: Invite family members or caregivers with role-based access. Everyone stays informed, nobody oversteps.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in three steps.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.description: Add your conditions, medications, allergies, and dietary preferences. Takes about two minutes.

step2.title: Get personalized safety
step2.description: ElinaCura cross-references your profile against food products, drug interactions, and nutrition guidelines.

step3.title: Stay protected daily

faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.q1: Is my health data private and secure?
faq.a1: Absolutely. ElinaCura is privacy-first by design — your PHI (protected health information) is kept on-device whenever possible, and any server-side data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never sell your data to third parties.
faq.q2: Do I need to be tech-savvy to use ElinaCura?
faq.a2: No. The interface was designed with multi-generational use in mind, with large touch targets, simple flows, and accessibility built in from day one. If you can use a smartphone, you can use ElinaCura.
faq.a3: Yes. Most features — including barcode scanning, Medical ID, your saved meal plans, and previously fetched safety data — work fully offline. Changes sync automatically when you reconnect.
faq.q4: How does the AI assistant know my health context?
faq.a4: When you create your profile, ElinaCura asks for your conditions, allergies, medications, and dietary preferences. The AI uses this context (with your permission) to give grounded, personalized guidance — and always recommends consulting your physician for clinical decisions.
faq.q5: Can I share access with my caregivers or family?
faq.a5: Yes. ElinaCura supports granular role-based caregiver sharing — you choose exactly what each person can see and edit (e.g. view safety only, or full profile management). Every action is logged in your audit trail.
faq.q6: Is ElinaCura a replacement for medical advice?
faq.a6: No — ElinaCura is a wellness companion, not a medical device. While we provide safety cross-checks and AI-powered guidance, always consult a qualified clinician for diagnosis and treatment decisions.

ai-chat.userMsg: Can I take ibuprofen with my blood pressure meds?
ai-chat.botMsg: Ibuprofen can raise blood pressure and blunt how well lisinopril works. For occasional pain, acetaminophen is usually a safer choice — but confirm with your clinician.
ai-chat.footer: Grounded in your profile · not medical advice
